/usr/bin/ar qc libdu_resource_manager.a CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_bearer_resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_pucch_resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_ran_resource_manager_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_srs_periodic_res_mng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/srs_resource_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/ue_capability_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_drx_resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_meas_config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/ra_resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_srs_aperiodic_res_mng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/du_resource_manager.dir/du_srs_manager_helpers.cpp.o ../../../../scheduler/config/CMakeFiles/sched_config_manager.dir/cell_bwp_res_config.cpp.o ../../../../scheduler/config/CMakeFiles/sched_config_manager.dir/cell_configuration.cpp.o ../../../../scheduler/config/CMakeFiles/sched_config_manager.dir/pdcch_config_pool.cpp.o ../../../../scheduler/config/CMakeFiles/sched_config_manager.dir/ue_configuration.cpp.o ../../../../scheduler/config/CMakeFiles/sched_config_manager.dir/sched_config_manager.cpp.o ../../../../scheduler/config/CMakeFiles/sched_config_manager.dir/du_cell_group_config_pool.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdu_resource_manager.a
